# pgecloudctl

> CLI for managing pgEdge Cloud resources. Supports table, JSON,
> and YAML output. Designed for both human operators and AI agents.

AI agents: run `pgecloudctl llms` to print the complete reference
(llms-full.txt) straight from the binary, and `pgecloudctl skill
install` to install the bundled Claude Code skill.

## Commands

- [Auth](docs/commands/auth.md): login, status, logout
- [Clusters](docs/commands/clusters.md): list, get, create, update, delete, shares
- [Databases](docs/commands/databases.md): list, get, create, update, delete, services, mcp, rag
- [Backups](docs/commands/backups.md): list, get, create, delete, url
- [Backup Stores](docs/commands/backup-stores.md): list, get, create, delete
- [SSH Keys](docs/commands/ssh-keys.md): list, get, create, delete
- [Ingresses](docs/commands/ingresses.md): list, get, create, delete, services
- [Invites](docs/commands/invites.md): list, get, create, delete, accept
- [Memberships](docs/commands/memberships.md): list, delete
- [Tasks](docs/commands/tasks.md): list, get, wait
- [Cloud Accounts](docs/commands/cloud-accounts.md): list, get, create, delete, cloudformation-template
- [Doctor](docs/commands/doctor.md): environment diagnostics
- Llms: print the complete AI-agent reference (llms-full.txt) from the binary
- Skill: install the bundled Claude Code skill to ~/.claude/skills

## Workflows

- [Full Stack Setup](docs/workflows/full-stack-setup.md): backup store, cluster, firewall, database, services, ingress
- [Deploy MCP](docs/workflows/deploy-mcp.md): MCP server on existing database
- [Deploy RAG](docs/workflows/deploy-rag.md): RAG server with pipeline config
- [Expose Service](docs/workflows/expose-service.md): ingress and service registration
- [Team Onboarding](docs/workflows/team-onboarding.md): invite, accept, verify

## Reference

- [OpenAPI Spec](openapi/pgedge.yaml): Full API specification
- [README](README.md): Installation and quick start
- [ROADMAP](ROADMAP.md): Feature roadmap
